title: The Lifecycle of E-Waste in a Landfill
description: A flowchart showing the journey of electronic waste from disposal in a landfill to its final environmental impact on land.
relationships: Rainwater percolates through e-waste, creating toxic leachate
Leachate seeps into and contaminates the surrounding soil
Contaminated soil pollutes the groundwater table
Toxins are absorbed by plant life growing in the soil
Toxins enter the food chain through plants and contaminated water
